heading: Standards and qualifications: result of failure to comply with
label: 12642 Standards and qualifications: result of failure to comply with

children.label: a
children.text: To be retained in an active status, a reserve commissioned officer must, in any applicable yearly period, attain the number of points under prescribed by the Secretary concerned, with the approval of the Secretary of Defense in the case of a Secretary of a military department, and must conform to such other standards and qualifications as the Secretary concerned may prescribe. The Secretary may not prescribe a minimum of more than 50 points under this subsection.section 12732(a)(2) of this title
be transferred to the Retired Reserve if he is qualified and applies therefor;
if he is not qualified or does not apply for transfer to the Retired Reserve, be transferred to an inactive status, if he is qualified therefor; or
if he is not transferred to the Retired Reserve or an inactive status, be discharged from his reserve appointment.

children.label: c
children.text: This section does not apply to commissioned warrant officers or to adjutants general or assistant adjutants general of States, Puerto Rico, and the District of Columbia.
